items.title: Oil slides after US-Iran ceasefire deal to reopen Strait of Hormuz

items.title: Iran ceasefire deal a partial win for Trump - but at a high cost
items.dek: The path to the two-week ceasefire with Iran may have fundamentally altered the way the rest of the world views the US.
